meaning: n.举起,加薪,增加v.举起,扬起,建造,饲养
examples: The book raises many important questions.
If one bank raises interest rates, all the others will follow their lead.
The question echoes around the Ankara cocktail circuit, but it raises a host of others.
Of course, this raises the question, what exactly the discerning chap or chap-ette wear to the event?
